niche: WorthScan used digital piano and keyboard resale valuation

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a WorthScan post for a used digital keyboard or stage piano listing.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Check model, key count, weighted keys, pedals, stand, power supply, speaker condition, cosmetic wear, and three local instrument comps.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Use manually reviewed examples and local notes only. No platform scraping or account automation.

trend_examples.hook: Count the keys before you pay
trend_examples.notes: Specific inspection hook works for instruments.
Feature reveal gives the value range a concrete driver.

trend_examples.hook: Missing pedals are not a small detail
trend_examples.notes: Accessory-risk reveal fits short-form resale advice.

notes: Local renderer is the only approved provider.
No provider credentials or external calls.
Social posting remains manual and disabled by default.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan this keyboard before you pay
slides.visual_direction: Show full keyboard, asking price, and visible model name.

slides.on_screen_text: Check model, keys, pedals, stand, and power
slides.visual_direction: Crop model plate, keys, power supply, stand, and pedal accessories.
Show comp cards with model, key count, included gear, and price.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract missing pedals, dead keys, and transport risk
Worth range: good buy or wrong model
slides.visual_direction: Show final range, confidence, and CTA.

output_requirements.caption: Used keyboard deal or wrong model? Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan estimates resale range, not guaranteed value.
output_requirements.spoken_script: A used keyboard value depends on model, key count, weighted action, pedals, stand, and power supply. Compare three similar local listings and subtract missing accessories or testing risk before giving the range.
posting_notes: Do not claim every key works unless verified by the human reviewer.
Keep the valuation disclaimer in posting notes.

qa_notes: Manual verification required for function claims.
